title: Silky Spicy Middle Eastern Creamed Corn Stir-fry
description: A floral and silky middle-eastern dish featuring creamed corn, deglazed with spices for a unique twist. Perfectly suited for weeknight meals, this keto-friendly recipe is sure to impress.
instructions: Place can of creamed corn in a baking dish.
Drizzle half of the olive oil over the corn, and sprinkle with salt and chopped parsley. Mix gently to combine and coat evenly.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
While the corn is baking, heat remaining oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add spicy harissa paste to the hot oil and stir until fragrant but not burnt. This should take about 30 seconds.
Pour the heated harissa into the baked corn, mix well to coat all pieces evenly with the sauce.
Serve immediately as a main dish or side.
